titleStmt.title: SII 8.715: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 715. (A.R. No. 399 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīkopperuñciṅ
katevarkku yāṇṭu 3- ḷu
vatu meṣanā
yaṟṟu tiyati nā
lā(nalā)nāḷThe date intended was probably the 4th day.
taṉiyūr pe
rumpaṟṟappu
liyūr veḷ
ḷaṟaik kavuci
yaṉ tirucciṟṟampa
lamuṭaiyāṉ pañcākṣara
tevaṉum veḷḷa
ṟaik kaviciyaṉ śrīpañcā
kṣaratevaṉ tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉaiye
mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya I
vaṉ pirāmaṇi tirukkaḻip
pālaiuṭaiyāṉ piḷḷai
yāṇṭiyum veḷḷaṟaik
kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyāṉ śrī pañcākṣara
tevaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭai
ya veḷḷaṟai tirucciṟṟampa
lamuṭaiyāṉ pirāmaṇi ce
ntaṉ tattaiyum veḷḷaṟai
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ centaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ
centaṉ tillaināyakaṉu
m Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka
Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi
ceṉṉittaḻumpa(pa)ṉ tirukkaḻi
ppālaiuṭaiyāḷum Ivvaṉai
vom kavaṇiyaṉ civaṉ
tirucciṟṟampala
tta nilam Ivvūr piṭākai kiramacoḻanallū(r)pāl śrī cuntaracoḻavatikku kiḻakku kaṇṭa
rātittavāykkālukku � ṇāṟṟu mutalcatirattu kākkaipātti Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa
nantamum kuḷamum nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum vi
ṟṟukkuṭutta piramā
mum koṇṭe kāṇṭa paricāvatu . kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyāṉ śrī pañcākṣaratevaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉum mātāvum Opāti kācu
133 10 3 Ivaṉpakkal Oṟṟikkum Acalukkum Ivarkaḷ vāṅkikkuṭutta
piḷḷaiyāḻvippiḷḷaikkum celvappiḷḷaikkum Acalukku kuṭutta kācu
1000 3 100 6 10 1 Iṉṉilattukku varikkācukku kuṭutta kācu Iṉnilattukku O
ṟṟikku Appāṇṭāṉukku kuṭutta kācu 1000 2 100 Īcāṉatevaṉukku Oṟṟipaṭi[*k]ku kuṭu
tta kācu 4 100 5 10 2 muttikku nāyakaṉukku Oṟṟipaṭikku kuṭutta kācu 4 100 5 Eruk
kuṭaiccikku Oṟṟikku kuṭuttak kācu 631 koṇṭāṉukku Oṟṟippaṭikku
kuṭutta kācu 1000- m Āṇṭār periyatevarkku Oṟṟipaṭikku kuṭutta kācu 2 100 Inta śrī
pañcākṣaratevar tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku kuṭutta kācu 1000 6 100 periyārkku kuṭu
tta kācu 2 100 5 10 Āka kācu 8 10 5[7 10]- m nāṅkaḷ kaiyil koṇṭa kācu 7 100 6 10 3 Āka kā
cu Oṉpatiṉāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu muppattumuṉṟum Ippaṭi koṇṭum centaṉ(t)
tanta kācu 9 1000 3 100 3 10- kku koṇṭapaṭi Iṉnilattukku Oṟṟikku tirunāṉacampantaṉukku kuṭutta
kācu 3 100 tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku kuṭutta kācu 2 100 veḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyāṉ centaṉpakkal Ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭa pattuc cey nilam Iraṇṭu māvum
vilaikoṇṭu Ivaṉukku kuṭutta kācu 10 Āṇṭār vāymatevarkku Iṉnilattil Oṟṟi
kkuk kuṭutta kācu 5 1000 5 100 Ivaṉ makaḷ Iḷamaināccikku kuṭutta kācu 2 100 Eṉ kaiyil koṇṭa
kācu 1000 100 6 10 1 Āka kācu 7 1000 3 100 6 10 9 Ivaṉ piṉpu taṉ kaiyyil koṇṭa kācu 1000 9 100 6 10 5 Ā
ka kācu 9(3)3 10 4 m Inta veḷḷaṟai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ centaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ
tillaināyakaṉum kācu 9 1000 3 100 3 10 3- kku koṇṭapaṭi Ivaṉukku Acalukku vaitta piḷḷai
yāḻvippiḷḷaikkum cellappiḷḷaikkum kuṭutta kācu 2 1000 7 100 3 10 8 Iṉnilattukku varikkācu
kku kuṭutta kācu 100 10- m Amaṇṇācaṟuttāṉukku kuṭutta kācu 100 5 10 Iṉnilattu Oṟṟikku Āḷuṭaiyāṉu
kku kuṭutta kācu 3 100 naṅkaiccikku Oṟṟikku kuṭutta kācu 5 100 tirukkiḷañceṭiuṭaiyāṉukku O
ṟṟikku kuṭutta kācu 100 Erukkuuṭaiccikku Oṟṟikku kuṭutta kācu 1000 5 100 8 10 Iṉnilattukku Oṟṟi
kku koṇṭāṉukku kācu 1000 tiruvāraka
yārkku Oṟṟi kuṭuttakācu 100 5 10 Āka kācu 8100 3 10 1 kaiyyil koṇṭa kācu 1000 2 100 2
m Āka kācu 9 1000 3 100 3 10 3 Āka śrīpaṇṭārattu vāṅki tillaivaṉamuṭaiya parameśva ri pa
ṇṭārattu vāṅki Ippaṭi kuṭuppittu kri yaiccelavu kuṭuttom Ikkācu Irupatte
ṇṇāyiramum Ippaṭi kuṭuttom ciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉukku Ivvaṉaivo
m. Ipparicu Ivvaṉaivarumaāka veṉa paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr kaṇakkaṉ puliyūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟā
ṉ tillaināyakanāṉa taṉmapiriyaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkire
yaccelavu kuṭutteṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ śrīpañcākkiratevaṉ Eḻut teṉṟum Ippaṭi
cammatittu
c celavutara
śrīpañcāḻca
ṉeḻut te
tirukkaḻippa
yicain
ciṟṟampalamu
Eṉ Eḻutte
yiruntu ki
ḷḷaṟai kavuci
Ippaṭi camma
yikkireyac
k kavuciyaṉ ti
ṉeṉ Eḻut
rum marātāra
ṉ Ivai EṉFurther portion containing some signatures is lost.
Digital edition of SII 8.715 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
